name: Instagram MCP Server
what_it_does: Instagram MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with Instagram — posting images and reels, reading comments and DMs, accessing follower analytics, scheduling content, and integrating Instagram into agent-driven social media management and content marketing workflows via Instagram Graph API or unofficial access.
use_cases: Posting images and captions to Instagram from content marketing agents
Reading and responding to Instagram comments from community management agents
Accessing follower growth and engagement analytics from marketing analytics agents
Scheduling Instagram content from social media calendar agents
Monitoring brand mentions and hashtags from social listening agents
Managing Instagram DMs for customer service from support agents
not_for: Bulk follow/unfollow automation (violates Instagram ToS — account ban risk)
Scraping at scale (Meta aggressively blocks scrapers)
Teams not managing Instagram business or creator accounts
best_when: A marketing or content agent needs to post, schedule, or analyze Instagram content — particularly for social media management workflows with business accounts and the official Graph API.
avoid_when: You need mass automation, follower buying, or engagement manipulation — these violate Instagram ToS and risk permanent account ban.

auth.notes: Instagram Graph API requires Facebook App approval, Instagram Business/Creator account, and OAuth 2.0 access token. Personal accounts require unofficial methods. Graph API access subject to Meta review.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Instagram Graph API: free for approved apps with rate limits
pricing.paid_tiers: None for basic access; Meta Business Suite features may have costs
pricing.notes: Instagram Graph API is free for approved business accounts. App review required by Meta. Community MCP server is free.

performance.rate_limits: Instagram Graph API: 200 calls/hour per user token by default

known_agent_gotchas: Meta App Review required for Graph API access — can take weeks; personal accounts blocked from API
Access tokens expire — implement token refresh in agent workflow
Rate limit of 200 calls/hour is very low for automated workflows
Instagram API v-versioning — Meta deprecates old versions; update MCP when API changes
Community MCP with unclear maintenance status — verify Graph API version supported
Media upload requires two-step process (create container, then publish) — higher complexity
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. OAuth 2.0 with Meta. Store access tokens securely. Meta App Review provides basic security validation. Do not automate behavior that violates Instagram Community Guidelines.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. OAuth 2.0. Meta App Review. Store tokens securely. No ToS violations.
